surface.name: JFrog Platform Cloud trial Docker hello-world push
surface.selection_basis: JFrog Cloud trial onboarding creates a hosted Artifactory environment. Official Docker docs and Cloud testing guidance walk through repository setup, docker login to *.jfrog.io, and docker push of hello-world as the first artifact success.

alternatives_considered.name: Self-hosted Artifactory
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Self-hosted path; Cloud trial is the hosted onboarding route.

alternatives_considered.name: Other package types (npm/Maven)
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Peer repository types; Docker hello-world is the documented Cloud test path.

entry_point.developer_intent: Start a JFrog Platform Cloud trial, configure a Docker repository, and push hello-world.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: docker push succeeds and hello-world appears in the Cloud Docker repository Artifacts tree.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: Artifactory Artifacts view shows the pushed hello-world image under the Docker repository.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Test Docker and Artifactory Cloud documents tag/push hello-world and verify the image in the repository.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: First Cloud success is a published artifact in Artifactory, not trial signup alone.

prerequisites.requirement: JFrog Platform Cloud trial environment (URL, username, password from signup email).

primary_path.action: Sign up for the JFrog Platform Cloud trial and log in with the emailed environment URL.
Create a Docker repository (local or virtual with default deployment repo) in Repositories.
primary_path.success_signal: Repository appears in the repository list.

primary_path.action: Run docker login SERVER_NAME.jfrog.io with Cloud credentials.
Pull/tag hello-world for SERVER_NAME.jfrog.io/REPO/hello-world:TAG and docker push.
Open Artifacts and confirm hello-world under the Docker repository.
primary_path.success_signal: Image metadata visible in Artifacts tree.

friction_gates.description: Cloud trial signup required before repositories.
